message:
fix(mvcc): correct sharded lock ordering and WAL writer field access

Fix lock acquisition ordering in the sharded MVCC implementation to
prevent potential deadlocks, and correct field access patterns in the
WAL writer for consistency with the sharded lock protocol.

- ffs-mvcc/sharded.rs: fix lock ordering across shard boundaries
- ffs-mvcc/wal_writer.rs: adjust field access to match sharded protocol

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
